name: quickstart-vdk

metadata.name: quickstart-vdk
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Versatile Data Kit SDK packaging containing common plugins to get started quickly using it.

documentation: # Quickstart-VDK This is the first VDK packaging that users would install to play around with. It packages: * Plugin for a local database to get started quickly * Plugin for job management (vdk-control-cli) * Plugin for local Control Service installation (vdk-server) See also [Versatile Data Kit Getting Started](https://github.com/vmware/versatile-data-kit/wiki/Getting-Started).
